{{Quote|You never know what I might have in stock, and my prices are always better than those crooks at Czerka Corp!|translated=1|Crattis saying goodbye to a customer|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Crattis Yurkal''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who ran the general store [[Aratech Mercantile]] inside the [[Jedi Enclave]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] in [[3956 BBY]]. He was very talkative, and despised the [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]]. He owned a blade that belonged to [[Sanasiki]].

==Behind the scenes==
In cut content of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', the player was to have found the corpse of Yurkal after he had been captured during the [[Attack on Dantooine (Jedi Civil War)|Attack on Dantooine]] and killed by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]].<ref name="strings">StrRef 1075 in the ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' dialog.tlk file: ''This is the corpse of Crattis Yurkal, the Twi'lek who ran the droid shop on Dantooine. The Sith must have captured him during the attack on the Jedi enclave and then dumped him here to die from his injuries.''</ref>
